issues.title: Auto-run a lightweight viewer server when an execution session starts
issues.description: The status-page viewer fails closed under file:// and today requires manually starting an http server. Ship a really simple view server that starts automatically when a session opens in a repo with execution set up, so the web page is always available. Likely mechanism: the SessionStart hook (rides the EXEC-043 per-feature hook plumbing) starting/reusing a tiny static server over the .excn JSON + viewer assets. Hard requirements: as lightweight and fast-running as possible — no framework, no build step, negligible startup cost, no orphaned processes (idempotent start, detect an already-running instance). Src-First.
acceptance_criteria: Opening a session in an execution repo makes the status page reachable in a browser with no manual step
Starting twice does not spawn a second server; no orphaned process after sessions end
Startup overhead is negligible and the server has zero runtime dependencies
Discovery record (port/pid/repo/started) written to the *_progress.json class and the URL surfaced into session context
Server binds localhost, GET-only, path-whitelisted to viewer assets + .excn JSON
issues.fix: viewer_server hook feature: SessionStart hash-port auto-run, zero-dep GET-only whitelisted daemon with idle self-exit, discovery record, doctor liveness; off in template, on here. package-qa PASS incl. live smoke; code-standards PASS (two revise cycles: named constants x5, truthful comment x1).
issues.notes: Filed 2026-06-10 (Brooks). Step 1 of the viewer-server track; validate here on the dogfood Instance before EXEC-047 generalizes it. Re-identified from EXEC-046 on 2026-06-10: the original id collided with a PRD-007 hook slice filed in a parallel session; sprint-4 close gate caught the lineage mismatch.

issues.title: Classify .excn/hooks.config.json as variant in the update path
issues.description: package-qa observation (sprint 4): hooks.config.json is invariant-classed in stamp-policy.js, so any Instance that flips toggles sees it reported as drifted on every update run — safe (never overwritten) but noisy. Decide variant-classing it (toggles are per-Instance state) or excluding it from drift reporting.
acceptance_criteria: update on an Instance with flipped toggles reports no hooks.config.json drift
issues.fix: hooks.config.json variant-classed in stamp-policy.js; flipped toggles no longer drift-reported; stale marker hash drops on next update. Gates PASS.
issues.notes: Filed 2026-06-10 from the final sprint-4 package-qa observation.

issues.title: sprint.schema.json does not define step_log; gate practice violates strict schema
issues.description: Adherence Agents append gate verdicts to a step_log array in the active sprint JSON (established practice since sprint 4 planning), but sprint.schema.json sets additionalProperties:false and defines no step_log — every gated sprint file fails strict validation. Resolve by adding an optional step_log definition to the schema (Src-First: src/template/.excn/schemas first, root mirrors) or by relocating verdict logging; the gate-watch verdict-sensing retro note (sprint 4) bears on the same choice.
acceptance_criteria: A gated sprint JSON validates strictly against sprint.schema.json
Adherence Agent verdict logging conforms to wherever the decision lands
issues.fix: Optional step_log added to sprint.schema.json (template + root); sprint_4/5 validate strictly; gate-watch verdict sensing extended (sprint-JSON writes + Stop-time evidence scan). Gates PASS (one revise cycle: named patterns).
issues.notes: Filed 2026-06-10 from scribe validation flag at sprint-4 record close.

issues.title: nothing-new-under-the-sun writes its digest to .excn/research/
issues.description: The prior-art agent's definition forbids file writes (final message is the deliverable), so its digest evaporates unless a human persists it — Brooks hit this running it in another repo. Change the definition: the agent writes its digest to .excn/research/prior-art-<prd-id>.md (overwriting its own prior run for the same PRD) and returns the path + summary as its final message. Keep all other prohibitions (no verdicts, no other file writes, sourced-only). Chartered definition change: alignment gate + Team Lead approval; Src-First with root mirror.
acceptance_criteria: Invoked with a PRD, the agent leaves a sourced digest at .excn/research/prior-art-<prd-id>.md
It writes nothing else and still issues no verdicts
alignment PASS; Team Lead approved; root mirrors src/template
issues.fix: prior-art agent writes its digest to .excn/research/prior-art-<prd-id>.md; alignment PASS, Brooks approved.

issues.title: Invoked Agents run on lighter models (sonnet for gates/research, haiku for clerk)
issues.description: Brooks's directive: one-off Invoked Agents don't need big models. Add model frontmatter: sonnet for the Adherence/gate agents (alignment, process-adherence in the Template; code-standards, package-qa at root) and nothing-new-under-the-sun; clerk stays haiku. Persistent Teammates keep inheriting the session model. Chartered definition change: alignment gate + Team Lead approval; Src-First with root mirrors.
acceptance_criteria: The five one-off defs carry model: sonnet (clerk stays haiku)
Persistent Teammate defs carry no model pin
alignment PASS; root mirrors src/template for stamped defs
issues.fix: model: sonnet on alignment/process-adherence/nothing-new (template+root) and code-standards/package-qa (root); clerk stays haiku; Teammates unpinned. alignment PASS, Brooks approved.

issues.title: Persistent Teammate definitions carry colors
issues.description: Brooks's directive: every persistent Teammate def gets a color in frontmatter for visual identification (scribe blue, builder orange, viewer green, packager purple, architect cyan); the _teammate.template.md shape gains the color line so new Instances inherit the convention. Chartered definition change: alignment gate + Team Lead approval; Src-First.
acceptance_criteria: All five persistent Teammate defs (and the template scribe.md + _teammate.template.md shape) carry color frontmatter
issues.fix: color frontmatter on all five persistent Teammates (scribe blue templated) + _teammate.template.md color line. alignment PASS, Brooks approved.
